column1: # ESP32 Partition Table - OTA-capable for Modbus RTU Server (FEAT-031)
# Dual OTA app partitions + otadata for rollback support
# NOTE: First flash after partition change requires serial upload + NVS erase:
#   pio run -t erase && pio run -t upload
# v7.9.7.3 layout (FEAT-146): OTA vokset til 1.812 MB (fra 1.625 MB)
# SPIFFS skåret til 256 KB. SPIFFS bruges kun til ST Logic source + bytecode
# cache (max 4 × (16 KB src + 8 KB .bc) ≈ 96 KB) — 256 KB giver stadig 2.6× margin.
# Name
# PHY init data (REQUIRED for WiFi!)
phy_init
# OTA data partition (tracks which app partition is active)
otadata
# OTA app partition 0 (1.812MB = 0x1D0000)
ota_0
# OTA app partition 1 (1.812MB = 0x1D0000)
ota_1
# NVS partition (64KB for ST Logic programs + config)
nvs
# SPIFFS partition (256KB — til ST Logic bytecode cache + source)
spiffs
